    MainApp - Class in model.app
    It implements the main app
    MainLoop - Class in model.app
    It implements the app's main loop
    makeAnOffer(ArrayList, ArrayList) - Method in class model.user.RegisteredClient
    Makes an offer for several second-hand products
    makeAnOfferOneProduct(SecondHandProduct, SecondHandProduct...) - Method in class model.user.RegisteredClient
    Makes an offer for a second-hand product
    manageDiscount() - Method in class model.app.ManagerLoop
    It allows a manager to manage a discount
    manageExchange(Exchange, boolean) - Method in class model.user.Employee
    Manages exchange
    manageExchange(Exchange, boolean) - Method in class model.user.ExchangePermission
    It allows an employee to change an exchange's status
    manageOrder() - Method in class model.app.OrderPermissionLoop
    It allows an employee with store permission to manage an order
    manageOrder(Order, OrderState) - Method in class model.user.Employee
    Gives an order a status and manages it
    manageOrder(Order, OrderState) - Method in class model.user.OrderPermission
    It allows an employee to change an order's status
    Manager - Class in model.user
    It implements the manager of the store
    MANAGER - Enum constant in enum class model.user.UserType
    Manager
    ManagerLoop - Class in model.app
    It implements the manager's loop
    markAsRead(Notification) - Method in class model.notification.NotificationHistory
    Marks a notification as read
    MiAplicacion - Class in ejemplosSwing.basico.paneles
     
    MiAplicacion(String) - Constructor for class ejemplosSwing.basico.paneles.MiAplicacion
     
    MINIATURE - Enum constant in enum class model.product.GameStyle
    Miniature game style
    MiPanel - Class in ejemplosSwing.basico.paneles
     
    model.app - package model.app
     
    model.demos - package model.demos
     
    model.discount - package model.discount
    It includes all the methods and classes necessary to apply and create discounts.
    model.exchange - package model.exchange
    It includes everything exchange-unique.
    model.notification - package model.notification
    This package contains everything related to the notifications of the store.
    model.order - package model.order
    It includes everything order-unique.
    model.product - package model.product
    It includes everything product-unique.
    model.search - package model.search
    This packages contains all the tools needed to make a search.
    model.store - package model.store
    It contains everything related to the management of the store.
    model.user - package model.user
    It contains everything related to the different users of the store.
    model.utilities - package model.utilities
    This package contains several utilities that are useful in the store.
